% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID5857.
\tzpentry{ID5857}{Poisson Field Strength Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5857 introduces Poisson Field Strength Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \{F, G\}_{Poisson} = \sum_i \left(\frac{\partial F}{\partial q^i} \frac{\partial G}{\partial \pi_i} - \frac{\partial G}{\partial q^i} \frac{\partial F}{\partial \pi_i}\right) + \sum_{i,j,k} \varepsilon^{ijk} \omega^i \left(\frac{\partial F}{\partial \omega^j} \frac{\partial G}{\partial \omega^k}\right) \end{equation}
\paragraph{Registry Metadata.}
UUID: \texttt{3fad6238-037d-56cb-a824-838cfd4b2c4f}. PiID: \texttt{PiID-5857}. LOC: \texttt{QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields}. arXiv: \texttt{physics.plasm-ph}.
